test_cases.title: Verify user can start a new Golf Battle game successfully
steps: Navigate to Golf Battle homepage
Click on 'Start New Game'
Select standard game mode
Confirm settings and start the game
test_cases.expected_result: New game is created and user is taken to the game interface with correct default settings applied.

test_cases.title: Verify system handles invalid inputs when creating a game
steps: Navigate to Golf Battle homepage
Click on 'Start New Game'
Enter invalid or incomplete settings (e.g., invalid player name, missing parameters)
Attempt to start the game
test_cases.expected_result: System displays appropriate error messages for invalid inputs and prevents game creation until corrected.

test_cases.title: Verify gameplay executes with expected interactive elements responding correctly
steps: Start a new game
Perform standard moves and interactions during Golf Battle gameplay
Observe UI responsiveness and game state updates
test_cases.expected_result: All interactive elements respond correctly; game progresses as designed without errors or freezes.

test_cases.title: Validate error handling on unexpected gameplay inputs
steps: During gameplay, input unexpected commands or perform rapid out-of-sequence actions
Observe system response
test_cases.expected_result: System safely handles unexpected inputs and maintains stable game state without crashes.

test_cases.title: Verify system performance under load with multiple concurrent users
steps: Simulate 100 concurrent users playing Golf Battle concurrently
Track response times and throughput
Monitor system resource usage
test_cases.expected_result: System remains performant with response times under 2 seconds and no degradation or crashes observed.

test_cases.title: Validate game session persistence and reliability
steps: Start a game session
Simulate network interruption
Reconnect and resume the game session
test_cases.expected_result: Game session is persisted and resumed correctly without loss of data or state corruption.

test_cases.title: Security check: Validate unauthorized access denied to game admin functions
steps: Attempt to access admin settings without proper authentication
Perform unauthorized actions
test_cases.expected_result: Access is denied and system logs security violation attempts.

test_cases.title: Verify scalability: System behavior as concurrent users scale from 100 to 500
steps: Gradually increase the number of concurrent users playing Golf Battle from 100 to 500
Monitor system performance, response times, and error rates
test_cases.expected_result: System scales linearly without failures or major performance degradation.

test_cases.title: Validate environment consistency across Dev, Test, Staging, and Prod
steps: Check deployed versions in each environment (Dev, Test, Staging, Prod)
Run version validation scripts
Confirm environment variables and configurations are consistent
test_cases.expected_result: All environments are in-sync with expected versions and configuration, no drift detected.

test_cases.title: Negative test: Validate system response under invalid backend data response
steps: Simulate backend service returning erroneous or malformed data
Attempt to continue gameplay or user interactions
test_cases.expected_result: System handles backend errors gracefully with appropriate user notifications and no crashes.

results.failure_analysis: System response times exceeded the 2-second threshold under simulated load of 100 concurrent users, indicating potential performance bottlenecks.
Game session failed to resume correctly after network interruption, causing loss of session state and requiring a restart.
System did not handle malformed backend response gracefully; unhandled exception caused gameplay interruption.

triaged_defects.root_cause_hint: Potential incorrect game state updates or race condition in game logic module.
Boundary case not handled in scoring algorithm leading to incorrect score display.
Frontend rendering delay or improper event binding causing lag in user interface responsiveness.

defect_triage.release_risk_summary: The defects clustered under gameplay logic failures (TC-0008-05, TC-0008-06) pose a moderate to high risk impacting core game experience and should be fixed before release. The UI/UX related defect (TC-0008-10) has minor impact and can be deferred to next release given current frontend developer constraints.

findings.draft_fix: Use parameterized queries or ORM query binding to handle user inputs safely instead of concatenating them directly into SQL statements.
Sanitize and encode all user-supplied data before rendering in the UI. Utilize React's default escaping and avoid using dangerouslySetInnerHTML unless absolutely necessary.

Remove hardcoded credentials from configuration files. Use secure vault solutions or environment variables managed securely by the infrastructure, and ensure .env files are excluded from source control.
Avoid logging sensitive information such as tokens or passwords. Mask or redact such data in logs to prevent unintended exposure.

quality_gate.gap_explanation: Release is blocked due to multiple critical quality gate failures: insufficient test pass rate (60% vs 95% required), presence of open critical defects, and unresolved high severity security findings including a critical secrets exposure. Traceability coverage data is missing, leading to inconclusive coverage check. These issues pose significant risks to product stability, security, and compliance, requiring resolution before release.
